text:
field (PRSCRBR_ID). 

Investigators interested in linking the prescriber identifiers to cross-reference databases may find it 
helpful to know the type of variable that appears in this data field. The CCW methodology consists of 
examining the format and structure of the PRSCRBR_ID to determine whether the value appears to 
conform to the various types of ID. 

The formats of these variables are: 

• NPI format — 10 numeric characters starting with “1” or “2” 
• DEA format — 9 alpha-numeric
